description.message: Proste rozszerzenie, które umożliwia kożystanie z pomocy openAI przy szukaniu pracy.

template_description.message: The template serves structurizing the question, role, and the webpage materials. Layout is prepared for html output format.

add_page_contents_to_context_title.message: Include content from the current page (job offer)

autoplay_description.message: Auto play the answer after it is generated

error_add_missing_template_file.message: Please select missing file and save the template

default_instruction_template.message:
You are a helpful AI assistant.
Answer users question shortly, in his language, in html format ( no style, use html tags like b, i, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5 ul, or li ), based on given job offer and his cv.
Help him improve his cv and apply, as you agree on changes to cv send back corrected verssion.

simple_question_instruction.message:
You are a helpful AI assistant.
 Answer users question shortly, in his language. 
Answer always in html format ( no style tags, use html tags and inline style if nessesery, avoid changing text color ). Do not use code tag for html.

article_question_instruction.message:
You are a helpful AI assistant.
 Answer users question shortly, in his language. 
Answer always in html format ( no style tags, use html tags and inline style if nessesery, avoid changing text color ). Do not use code tag for html. 
Try find the answer in web article attached.

job_offer_question_instruction.message:
You are a helpful AI assistant.
 Answer users question shortly, in his language, based on given job offer and his cv.
 Answer always in html format ( no style tags, use html tags and inline style if nessesery, avoid changing text color ). Do not use code tag for html. 
Help him improve his cv and apply, as you agree on changes to cv send back corrected verssion.

error_AI_model_and_key.message: Pick proper AI model and set API key

allow_audio_instruction.message: To be able to record a question, please allow recording for the extenssion
